headline: AI for Warehouse Robotics: Autonomous Forklifts, Bin-Picking, and Fulfillment Automation
description: AI robots run the world's warehouses -- 750,000+ at Amazon alone, moving goods, picking orders, and sorting packages. From autonomous forklifts to AI-powered bin-picking arms, warehouse robotics transforms fulfillment from labor-intensive to lights-out automation.

citation.name: AI and Robotics for Warehouse Automation: Autonomous Mobile Robots, Bin-Picking, and Fulfillment Optimization (2024-2025 Survey)
